item.description:
What's new in 0.1.20

  • New (optional): "Sleep when tools go idle". In Automatic mode, let your Mac sleep while a watched tool is sitting idle, instead of staying awake the whole time it's open. Off by default - turn it on in Apps & Tools, and pick how long to wait. Works best for CPU-heavy tools like builds, and for agents running in the Claude app.
  • The Status list now shows whether each watched tool is Working or Idle when that option is on.
  • The Apps & Tools list now scrolls properly, so you can see your full list of tools and the settings below it.
